summary: test_auto_advance_does_not_cascade_through_a_freshly_entered_state chains WORKING->MIDDLE->(would-be COMPLETE) and asserts it stops at MIDDLE, genuinely catching recursive re-evaluation; note it currently fails (not passes) since it depends on REQ-001.1.1's auto-advance also being implemented — both hops are currently absent, giving 'WORKING' not 'MIDDLE' — but the test's discriminating logic is sound once the prerequisite lands.
